summary: IELTS 17 Test 4 fixes verified successfully. All 3 requested fixes are working: 1) Writing Task 1 image accessible and displays correctly, 2) Speaking Part 2 task_card bullets render properly, 3) Reading Q37-40 summary_completion type with correct answers.
critical_code_review_comments: CambridgeTestInterface.js correctly supports both 'points' and 'bullets' fields for task_card rendering (line 2160-2161)
summary_completion type renders with text inputs when no word_box is provided (line 1487-1496)
Writing Task 1 image loads from /api/cambridge/images/ielts17/test4/test4_writing_task1.png (122KB PNG)
context_for_next_testing_agent: IELTS 17 Test 4 fixes verified. All features working: Writing Task 1 line graph image displays correctly, Speaking Part 2 shows 4 bullet points under 'You should say:', Reading Q37-40 renders as summary_completion with text inputs and correct answers (memory, numbers, communication, visual). Known issue: Session persistence bug causes test to reset to Listening when navigating directly - must start Listening first then switch sections.

writing_task1_image.details: Returns 200, valid PNG (122KB), displays line graph 'Number of shop closures and openings 2011-2018'

speaking_part2_bullets.frontend_check: All 4 bullets render under 'You should say:' text
bullets: why you had to do this in a hurry
and explain how you felt about having to do this in a hurry

reading_q37_40_summary_completion.title: How the research was carried out
reading_q37_40_summary_completion.frontend_check: 4 text input fields render for Q37-40

known_issues.session_persistence: Login session may be lost when navigating directly to test URL or switching sections - must start Listening first then navigate to other sections. This is a pre-existing bug.
